name: superloopflow
description: Unified LOOP-era development orchestrator. v0.4 uses READ-ONLY plugin discovery. /loop:* commands dynamically bridge to installed plugins by reading their plugin.json + commands + skills frontmatter. NO writes to any third-party plugin directory. v0.4 was created after discovering that v0.3's manifest-protocol approach was too invasive — we now work with what plugin authors already publish.

plugins.name: dramatron-workflow
plugins.description: Unified LOOP-era development entry point. 18 /loop:* commands dynamically bridge to plugins via READ-ONLY discovery. 5 skills for orchestrating agents, skills, code, and agentic tools.
